principle: Micks-first. Outside handicappers and models are supporting confirmation only, not the engine.

grading.A+: Rare premium straight bet. VIP eligible.
grading.A-: Strong premium play with one material variance concern. VIP eligible.
grading.B+: Strong public play with multiple verified edges.
grading.C: Lean, watchlist, longshot, live-only, or optional sprinkle.

must_have: Grade A+, A, A-, B+, or B
Status Pending, Released, VIP Released, or Free Released
never_eligible: Elite Favorite Set-1 Loss Live Watchlist

source_policy.conflict_rule: Downgrade to B-, C, Watchlist, or Pass unless Micks has a clear independent reason.
source_policy.writeup_requirement: Distinguish verified facts, model projections, external opinions, and Micks conclusions.

universal_requirements: Explain the actual matchup or role-based edge
Include odds, best number, and no-bet cutoff when available
Explain how the bet is expected to cash
Connect grade and units to evidence strength
Do not invent statistics, injuries, trends, or consensus
Preserve exact pick, market, grade, units, odds, best number, and cutoff
Write specifically for the listed matchup

required_concepts: Reason no pregame wager is made
Specific conflict, pricing issue, uncertainty, correlation problem, or missing confirmation

field_mapping.Writeup: Customer-facing concise analysis appropriate to the pick tier
field_mapping.Risk: Strongest failure path, not a generic disclaimer
field_mapping.Market Notes: Price movement, alternative-market comparison, best number, and cutoff context
field_mapping.Home Preview: Public teaser that does not expose protected VIP numbers or full reasoning

use: Clear separation of model projection and market price
avoid: Birthday or superstition as handicapping evidence
Backend, routing, JSON, prompt, model-debug, or import terminology

publishing_validation: Every official pick has a tier-compliant writeup
VIP full analysis is visible only in the protected destination
Free, Props, Parlays, and Longshots render in their proper sections
Displayed unit total equals official play risk
Public and VIP repositories use the same final pick facts while respecting access gating
Live endpoint is verified after deployment

rules: Calculate Profit/Loss, ROI, CLV, CLV Result
Copy completed row to Results Archive
Include Original Table, Original Record ID, Record Key, Archived At
Delete from active table only after archive creation succeeds
Avoid duplicates by Record Key or Original Record ID

full_analysis_sections: Opening Thesis / Why We Like It

B_or_higher_gate: Lineup confirmed or projected lineup supports handicap
At least two independent paths to cash
MLB.correlation_rule: Do not stack side + pitcher K + pitcher outs + team total as official plays from same game.

rules: Model gap plus injury/role confirmation required
Use live triggers when pregame number is uncertain
Prefer spread protection over ML when close-game script is likely
Check injuries, minutes, foul trouble, pace, and late-game path
Playoff ML coin flips stay B- or lower unless price is strong
Use live entry when pace/goalie/penalty flow determines edge
Prefer one clear ML/value side over multiple underdog darts

Tennis.status: Pilot only. Generic live rules are watchlist only unless actual player/match/odds/units are specified.

NASCAR.rule: No official NASCAR after race starts unless using live-market edge. Without price, Watchlist only.

codex_role: Validate Pick of the Day filters
Verify deployed endpoints before reporting completion
